text: Eating a balanced diet is one of the most important parts of healthy living. Aim to include plenty of fruits, vegetables, whole grains, and lean proteins in your meals, while limiting processed foods and sugar. Alongside nutrition, regular exercise—such as walking, cycling, or swimming—helps keep your body strong and your mind clear. Remember, sleep is just as vital as diet and activity. Adults typically need seven to nine hours per night to rest and recover. Equally crucial is mental health, which can be supported by managing stress and maintaining a good work-life balance. Making time for hobbies, connecting with friends, and saying no to extra tasks when you are overloaded helps prevent burnout. By nurturing both body and mind, you can enjoy a healthier, happier life.
